narrative:
Union Township E (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,731 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
